node.title: Uber | Phone Screen | Timer & Max points on a line

topic.title: Uber | Phone Screen | Timer & Max points on a line

post.content:
I was asked these two questions for my first and second phone interview. 
Ended up getting rejected after the second one. :( 
I missed some edge cases and needed some help on how to calculate the lines. 

**Interview 1: [React]**
* Create a timer that counts down from 10 - 0. Has the ability to pause and resume. Display timer. 
* Convert the timer into a lap timer. Starts from 0 - Infinity. Lap button will save time and lap number. 
Display all laps and lap times. "Lap 1: 10" 

**Interview 2:**
* https://leetcode.com/problems/max-points-on-a-line

Oof, max points on a line is brutal to get right. I haven't yet come across a solution that isn't a dizzying mess of hacks and edge cases to attempt to pass all the tests.

I can only hope they give brownie points for at least being aware of duplicate points being part of infinitely many lines, the limited precision of doubles, divide by zero, multiply overflow, etc.

Do you know if they test for `94911151` vs. `94911152` like LeetCode does?
and was this for an entry level position?
